title: Outcome-classifier accuracy
headline: Stuck-detector: precision 100%, recall 100%, 0 false rage-quits on 125 progressing traces; frames-similar accuracy 100%; is_success all checks pass.
notes: Offline, seeded (np.random.default_rng(0)). is_stuck over 225 labeled histories (positives: exact-repeat loops + jittered dead-spot clicks w/ '— nothing changed on screen'; negatives: distinct progress, moving clicks (>14px), close-but-reacted clicks, <3-step histories). frames_similar over 120 labeled PNG pairs (identical bytes, sigma=3 noise variants, distinct content). Noise sweep locates the similar->different flip. is_success: predicate True/False/async/raises propagate correctly and the default (no predicate) is always-False (anti-false-positive).
